problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
hypothesis: Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus may resolve Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
